summary: The test suite is exceptionally well-crafted. It achieves excellent coverage of core logic (globs, priorities, deduplication) through fast unit tests, while simultaneously implementing a highly robust E2E testing harness using `act`. The E2E tests correctly isolate environments using temporary git repositories, cleanly assert on standard output by parsing JSON, and validate the workflow YAML structure and actionlint compliance. Excellent handling of edge cases and error scenarios.
